snapshot.notes: Bed rotting all morning, not hungry, felt bloated. Lower back and arms sore from Friday lifting. Upper thighs sore. Ran fasted.

running_data.notes: Lowest peak HR of the week despite longest distance. Easy effort. No core — intentionally skipped due to lower back soreness.

notes: Lowest HR at longest distance — aerobic efficiency signal. Fasted run. Skipped core intentionally (lower back soreness from Friday). Subjective energy was 4/10 pre-workout but session went well at easy effort.
